-Fresh challenges and machines awaiting your conquest.
-Enhanced game performance and stability.
-Improved graphics to elevate your gaming experience.
-Bug fixes for a smoother and more enjoyable gameplay.

Wishing you the best of luck and a fantastic time in Jackpotland!

title: Watcher of Realms
notes:
1. [Anniversary Celebration]
The Anniversary Celebration events are launching soon, bringing tons of rewarding events!

2. [New Raids]
Challenge the brand‑new Gallery of War and Final Frontier.

3. [Faction Trial]
New [Arbitration and Dominion] stages are now available, featuring new Bosses and mechanics!

4. [Adjustments & Optimizations]
Enhanced and adjusted multiple heroes. Increased the Background Auto-fight speed to 6x.

title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

Follow us for news:
- Discord/Facebook/X/Instagram/TikTok: @thatskygame
- YouTube/Twitch: @tha
